note: Lateral outward asym-roll arm design: sagittal foot-x pitch swing only for vx/yaw, lateral roll outward with left_sign=+1 right_sign=-1, amp 0.22, foot-extra 0.18, roll max 0.48, inward roll target/hard limit capped at 0.14 rad while outward remains 0.55 rad, and lateral pitch-down same-angle constraint.
